info.name: ManzomaERP API
info.description: ManzomaERP backend API collection. Run Login as Super Admin or Login as Company Admin to populate authToken. Creation requests automatically store returned IDs for subsequent update requests.

request.description: Check API health, version, and environment.
Returns platform metrics for Super Admin or company metrics for company users.
Company Admins can omit company_id. Super Admins must provide it for company-scoped roles.

request.description: This replaces the plan's complete feature assignment set.

item.name: Add or Update One Plan Feature

request.description: Adds this feature to the plan or updates its enabled state and value without affecting other features.
Removes only this feature from the selected plan.
Cancels the current active subscription and activates the selected plan.
Select an employee document before sending. Repeating this request creates a new document version.

item.name: Submit My Leave Request
item.description: Run while authenticated as a company user with a linked employee profile.

request.description: Select a file in Postman before sending. Maximum file size is 20 MB.
